ordinanceLabel: SPMC Title XV (Building) | Title XVI (Dev Code) · American Legal · through Ord 1327 (2023)
fireAgency: Ventura County Fire Protection District (VCFPD) — email fireprevention@ventura.org with Form 610
portal: Counter-based — no dedicated online permit portal
buildingDept: Building & Safety Division, Community and Economic Development
buildingDeptNote: 200 S. 10th Street, Santa Paula, CA 93060. Phone: (805) 933-4218. Email: buildsafe@spcity.org. Hours: M-F 8am-Noon, 1-4:30pm (closed every other Friday). Fire plans: VCFPD — email fireprevention@ventura.org with Form 610. All new structures/additions require fire sprinklers per VCFPD.
suggestedQuestions: Is my Santa Paula property in the WUI fire hazard zone?

How do I submit fire plans to VCFPD for a Santa Paula project?
